description: Sarge and Jaco pursue and confront a man who is one of their mysterious targets. The scene is terse and foreboding, hinting at the foes' otherworldly objectives and the lethal consequences for their victims. Sarge and Jaco work methodically, marking the man as one of those who 'doesn't belong.'

transcript.line: That's our mark.
Whoa. What's going on? Where's he going?
I've been looking all over for you.
I love this part. Definitely not a butterfly.
So who's next?
I'm thinking about calling it the Post-Food Movement.
The Post-Food Movement. I love it.
Could you help me come up with some hashtags for that?
Obviously.
Thanks, babe.
Mr. Shaw. Our latest taste test.
Okay, well, let's, uh... let's give it a shot. Mmm. Closer. It's definitely closer. It's just... I can still taste that taste that I can't ever... forget. Just keep trying.
Mr. Shaw?
Yes?
I'm so sorry. There's this weird guy who said he had an appointment and couldn't wait. He's in the conference room.
What? The meeting isn't for another two hours. I haven't updated the deck.

This is what you get for making business connections at Burning Man. All right. Trevor, just load the presentation into the holo-table. Kaya, hold off on the pellets. And, Lindsay, could I just get a charcoal water?
Yes, Mr. Shaw.
Thanks so much.
But Deke... I still need boba.
Sequoia, babe, me, too. Is there... any way maybe you could go get the boba and bring it back and we'll have it together, just so I can close this deal? Please?
Okay.
